ratings.notes: proposed_contextual_controlled<TAB>4<TAB>5<TAB>3<TAB>4<TAB>Short note: Balances context and persona but lacks some naturalness in tone, slightly stiff for a merchant dialogue style.

baseline_no_context<TAB>2<TAB>1<TAB>4<TAB>5<TAB>Lacks both relevance to the current situation and consistency with Merchant persona; also fails at naturalness due to its formality in a merchant's dialogue.
